titleStmt.title: SII 25.209: original edition by M. D. Sampath
No. 209. (A.R. No. 209 of 1908.) KŌVILŪR, PATTUKKOTTAI TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: West base of the verandah in the first prākāra in the Mantrapurīśvara temple.
This incomplete record may be assigned to c. 13th century on grounds of palaeography.

It records an order (ōlai) of Pallavaraiyaṉ alias Rājagambhīraśōḻa-Pallavaraiyaṉ granting the lands of mā-kāṇi-mundirigaik-kīḻarai including the residue (migudi-uḷḷaḍaṅga) at Nambaṉkuṟuchchi as iṟaiyili to provide for the food-offerings on the occasion of a sandhi named nāḍuḍai-ṉāyakaṉsandhi to the deity Tiruvuś-ttāṉam-uḍaiya-ṉāyaṉār at Uśāttāṉam alias Kēraḷakulāśaṉich-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Puṟaṅkarambai-nāḍu in Rājēndraśōḻavaḷanāḍu. Among the boundaries of his kāṇi lands in the above place, mention may be made of Vīrakkōṉmaṅgalam-uḍaiyāṉ lands in the village paṟṟu forming its eastern boundary. It is stated as maḍakku-nilam. The other details are not given as the beginnings of lines 11-19 are lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī pallavarāyaṉāṉa Irāca kempirac coḻa pallavaraiyaṉ Olai . Irācen
tira coḻa vaḷaṉāṭṭuppuṟaṅkarampai ṉāṭṭu Ucāttāṉamāṉa keraḷa kulācanic
caruppeti maṅkalattu Uṭaiyār tiruvucāttāṉamuṭaiya ṉāyaṉār koyil tā
ṉattār kaṇṭu Iṉṉāyaṉārkku nāṭuṭaiṉāyakaṉ sandhi Oṉṟu Amutu ceytaru
ḷukiṟa sandhikku Amutu paṭikkum viññaṉattukkum Uṭalāka Iṭakkaṭavatāṉa nilattu
kku muṉpu Iṭṭaṉilam nikki Iṟaiyiliyāka tantaWritten below the line.nilam nampaṉ kuṟucciyil Eṉkā
ṇiyāṉa ṉilattu Iṭṭa muṉṟām vāykkālk kiḻ kaṇṭattuṉilattukkuk kiḻpā
ṟkkellai Ūr paṟṟu virakkoṉmaṅkala muṭaiyāṉ ṉilattukku me
ṟkkum teṉpāṟkkellai Iṉṉāyaṉār tevatāṉattukku vaṭakkum melpā
ṟkkellai Ivvāykkālukku kiḻakku vaṭapāṟkellai Iṉṉāyaṉār
The beginnings of 11-19 are lost.tevatāṉattukku teṟkum Āka Icaiṉta peruṉāṉ kellaiyuḷ naṭuvupaṭṭa
Iṉṉilam Orumā muṉtirikaiyum Āṇṭā ṉoṭaikku meṟkuṉ kīḻ
pāṟkellai Āṇṭāṉoṭaikku meṟkkum teṉpāṟk kellai Iṉṉāyaṉār
tukku vaṭakkum coḻiya varaiyaveḷāṉ paṟṟukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkkellai
tevatāṉattukkut teṟk(k)kum Āka Icainta peruṉāṉkellaiyuḷ ṉaṭuvupaṭṭa
Āka rūpāy Iṉṉilam mākāṇi muntirikaik kiḻaraiyum mikuti
Uḷḷaṭaṅka tiripuvaṉac cakkaravattikaḷ śrī rācentira coḻatevaṟku yā
mutal Iṉṉāyaṉārkku tiruṉāmattukkāṇiyum Iṟaiyiliyumāka tanta Iṉṉilat
Ippaṭi maṭakku Eṉkāṇippaṟṟu maṭakku Uṭaṉe kūṭṭi muṉpu Iṟukkiṟa paṭiye IIncomplete and left unengraved.
Digital edition of SII 25.209 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
